heading: POSTPONEMENT OF DEPARTMENTAL ELECTION
content:
This is to formally inform all students of the Cyber Security department that the departmental election earlier scheduled to hold on the 5th of June has been postponed.

This decision was necessitated by the two-week suspension of academic activities recently announced by the school management...

Signed:
Hon. Comm. Anideh Chukwunonso V. (Chairman, ICEC)
Hon. Comm. Dugwu Deborah N. (Secretary, ICEC)

heading: SIWES ONLINE REGISTRATION ONGOING
content:
REGISTRATION MANDATE:

1. Visit the portal to initiate your process: portal.futo.edu.ng/sundry/all and select the necessary steps to make your online payment and registration.

2. Print out the Remita receipt after payment. It will be submitted physically to the Course Representative with your passport photograph attached at the SIWES OFFICE.

3. Physical logbooks will be on sale soon. Payment details and next steps will be communicated as soon as the printout submissions are processed.
